description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat tactical vehicle, resembling an infantry fighting vehicle or armored personnel carrier. The exterior is covered in a matte, sand-colored finish, with visible reinforced armor plating enveloping the entire body. The vehicle features a prominent turret on the roof, equipped with multiple weapon mounts, including what appear to be machine guns and possible missile launchers. Antennas and various sensors are mounted on the roof, indicating advanced communication and targeting capabilities. The sides display robust track systems with multiple road wheels, designed for traversing rough urban and off-road environments. No visible military markings or insignia are present, and the vehicle lacks any camouflage pattern beyond its solid color.
description: A sand-colored, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a turret, multiple weapon mounts, and robust track systems. It features antennas and sensors but no visible markings or camouflage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced frontal armor, two prominent antennas, and the main turret with weapon mounts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the track system, side armor, and the turret's side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor plating, rear access hatch, and the continuation of the track system.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the track system, side armor, and turret from the opposite angle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts on the roof turret: one large-caliber machine gun mount and one possible missile launcher, both centrally located.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, reinforced armor plating; sloped and modular panels are visible on the front, sides, and rear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid sand color; no camouflage pattern visible.
